root_cause: Vite import analysis hits Nuxt manifest.js dynamic import during dev client pre-bundle
prevention_details: Documented tradeoff; link upstream nuxt issues
commit_message: fix(nuxt): disable app manifest to silence Vite #app-manifest dev noise
follow_ups: Revisit if client route rules need manifest; nuxt/nuxt#33606

error_message: Suspense is an experimental feature (stdout noise)
root_cause: Vue dev warning from Suspense in Nuxt test environment
approach: Filter known Suspense substring on console log;warn
prevention_details: Other console output preserved; comment explains why
commit_message: fix(test): filter Suspense experimental console noise in Vitest
follow_ups: Remove filter when Vue stabilizes Suspense or Nuxt stops emitting the warning

error_message: Postgres: relation bikes does not exist (bikes.public.get)
root_cause: Schema not applied to the database behind DATABASE_URL (or placeholder URL if unset)
approach: README first-run; npm run setup:db alias; no handler change
prevention_details: Document DATABASE_URL; setup:db maps to drizzle-kit push; same as db:push
commit_message: docs(dev): first-run DB setup and fix-report for missing bikes table

root_cause: imageUrl column defined in Drizzle schema.ts (line 20) was never applied to the Neon database — migrations 0000-0008 all predate the column
trigger: GET /api routes hitting components table (bikes.index, bikes.templates, SWR cache)
approach: ALTER TABLE components ADD COLUMN image_url text via Neon MCP; generated 0009_wise_paladin.sql
prevention_details: Any new schema field must immediately be followed by db:generate + db:push/migration
commit_message: fix(db): add missing image_url column to components table (0009_wise_paladin)
follow_ups: Run npm run db:push in fresh envs; consider startup schema-diff check
